general_inquiry.question: Differentiate the following function: $\sqrt[3]{-3 x-2} \cos (6 x+4)$ Do not show work just give me the final answer!!!
general_inquiry.response:
The derivative of the function \(\sqrt[3]{-3x-2} \cos(6x+4)\) is:

\[
\cos (6 x+4) \left(-\frac{1}{\sqrt[3]{\left(-3 x-2\right)^2}}\right) \cdot (-3) + \sqrt[3]{-3 x-2} \cdot (-6\sin (6 x+4))
\]
